recommendations.overview: When their ocean liner capsizes, a group of passengers struggle to survive and escape.

recommendations.overview: A headstrong young teacher in a private school in 1930s Edinburgh ignores the curriculum and influences her impressionable 12-year-old charges with her over-romanticized worldview.

recommendations.overview: A musical adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic ghost tale starring Albert Finney.

recommendations.title: MR-9: Do or Die
recommendations.overview: Elite Bangladeshi CIA agent Masud Rana – codename MR-9 – teams up with an American CIA operative to bring down an international criminal organization headed by a ruthless businessman.

recommendations.title: The Gray Man
recommendations.overview: When a shadowy CIA agent uncovers damning agency secrets, he's hunted across the globe by a sociopathic rogue operative who's put a bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: Secret Magic Control Agency
